WARNINGS: For cosmetic use only; Do not swallow; Avoid direct contact with eyes; Temporary teeth sensitivity may occurs; STOP using when sustained discomfort or irritation occurs; Do not use if you have mouth ulcers, gum injury or after oral operations; Store in a cool, shaded place; Keep out of reach of children. title: Renew Eyebrow Revitalizer Eyebrow Growth Oil - All Natural Formula Promotes Natural Hair Growth for Luxuriant Eyebrows - Gently Cleanses and Removes Dead Skin Cells for Healthy Vibrant Hair Follicles
features:
['Our proprietary eyebrow growth oil nurtures and stimulates hair follicles for bold, distinctive eyebrows'
 'Renew eyebrow revitalizer combats patchy, thin eyebrows with its blend of natural oils, minerals and organic extracts'
 'Encourages natural hair growth by gently removing dead skin cells and stimulating blood flow to follicles'
 'Our eyebrow growth oil is comprised of Rosemary oil, Niacin, Lemon extract, and Hibiscus Rosa - Sinesis among other ingredients which promote thicker, more lustrous eyebrows'
 'Renew eyebrow growth oil is a concentrated serum which is a safe effective formula to help transform the look and feel of your eyebrows']
description:
['Frustrated by patchy, thin eyebrows?'
 'Renew Eyebrow Revitalizer can help create healthy, lustrous eyebrows through completely natural hair growth. Our eyebrow growth gel taps the wonders of nature to transform your look from lifeless to luxuriant.'

 '. The secret lies in the proprietary formula of Renew Eyebrow Revitalizer. Rosemary oil and Niacin boost blood flow to hair follicles restoring existing hair strands and germinating new ones. features:

 'INGREDIENTS: Deionized Water, Sodium Hexametaphosphate, Glycerine, Sodium Chlorite, Potassium Iodide, Disodium Phosphate, Monopotassium Phosphate, Sodium Citrate, Phosphino Carboxylic Acid Poloxamer 407, Sucralose, Sodium Hydroxide, Phosphoric Acid.'
 'PROMOTE FRESH BREATH in your pet while reducing plaque and tarter. It is a lot less expensive than a professional vet pet teeth cleaning.'
 "USE on a regular basis to keep your pet's mouth and breath fresh."
 'ALCOHOL FREE Stays Fresh until Activated']
description: ['It’s important to take care of your pet’s teeth and gums, and Dr. George’s Plaque Blast promotes better oral and systemic health. Just spray it against the upper back teeth and front, corner teeth of your dog or cat. Use it regularly, and you’ll be helping to control tartar, plaque, and bacteria, and bad breath. Unlike other products, Dr. George’s Plaque Blast contains no alcohol, which in a report by “Consumer Reports” magazine cites that the National Cancer Institute has linked alcohol in mouthwash to mouth and throat cancers.']

 'WE ALL NEED MAGNESIUM: Magnesium can help with nerves, muscles, heart, hormones, bones, teeth, and more. It provides relief from stress, improves sleep, reduces pain and has innumerable benefits. That’s because magnesium is an essential mineral for health.'
 'RELAX THE NATURAL WAY: Stress overstimulates the nervous system. Magnesium – when it’s available in adequate supply – slows the nervous impulse, shuts down adrenaline responses and relaxes muscles.'

['REVERENCE FOR THE PROCESS OF RENEWAL - Reverence skincare products are meticulously crafted for people that have a deep respect for themselves, the earth, and the process of renewal. We believe that what’s good for the earth will be good for our bodies. That’s why all of our artisan handcrafted products are made with fewest & purest ingredients nature has to offer.'
 "REFRESHING NATURAL FEEL - Leave your skin feeling fresh and smooth with tea tree and lavender essential oils balancing your skin back to it's natural PH. These simple, natural ingredients combine to leave a light floral scent that lasts for a moment and then vanishes, all while shrinking your pores, reducing blackheads and acne, while micro-exfoliating."
 'GUARANTEE - We’re sure that you’ll be thrilled with your experience with our natural toner. But, if for any reason you’re not, then we’ll refund your order.'
 "A SIMPLE SOLUTION - For people struggling with acne, blackheads, eczema, or simply living an active lifestyle, sometimes the best option for skincare is eating clean natural foods, reducing unnecessary stresses in our lives, and following that up with a natural skin care regime. That's why we made our full line of facial cleansing bars, tea tree lavender toner, and facial moisturizer, with a short list of pure ingredients."
 'A FEW PURE INGREDIENTS - Our toner is hand-made with organic, natural, and vegan ingredients, right here in the USA and never contains synthetic fragrances, parabens, dyes, or GMO’s.']

description: ["Diameter of each jar: 2.5cm  size: 2.0mm   How to use:  1.gradient.  you can use your nail or false nail tips. brush nail base gel on the nail, use a acrylic pen to touch a few rhombus glitter and put the pen to press the nail (rhombus glitter evenly stick on the nail) before the nail polish dry. remember do not use the pen to brush on the nail .it will be unnatural, you can sprinkle the rhombus glitter in the front of nail.  2.orrnment.  after use the nail polish and draw design. you can sprinkle the rhombus glitter what color you want in the local or specific position. can create a distinctive dazzle beautiful effect. also can spread on clear nail polish or base gel what the pattern you choose, sprinkle the rhombus glitter before the nail polish dry. such not only save time, but also ensure that won't destroy the draw pattern.  3.acrylic nail and UV nail.  before you spread on the last powder or gel ,use the small cotton to stick the rhombus glitter and gently press on the acrylic nail or UV nail, then spread on the last clear powder or clear UV gel.  WARM NOTE: suggest that spread on clear bright oil until the nail polish dry. the effect will be more beautiful and natural.   Package Included:  12 colors nail tips"]

title: Gelaze, UP ALL NIGHT 0.5 fl oz
description: ['A high gloss dark navy blue with a light shimmer. 100% Gel Polish that includes a base coat. Fewer steps for longer wear. Unique powder coated bottles are color-matched to showcase true shades. Details Gelaze is an innovative 2-step, 100% gel polish system that delivers a long-lasting high-gloss manicure with a flawless chip-free finish for up to 14 days. Available in a variety of fashion-forward China Glaze colours ranging from pastels to glitters to industry-leading neons, there__ a shade to suit every personality. The Gel-n-Base formulation requires fewer steps making this accelerated service a must-have for any nail professional. Gelaze is curable with an LED or UV lamp. HOW TO USE Shake Gelaze bottle vigorously before PREP, while holding it upside down before beginning your prep/application process. This will ensure correct blend of pigment. PREP: Perform a DRY manicure. Remove shine from the natural nail with a 240 grit file. Remove dust. Cleanse nail plate with acetone or 91% alcohol. Be sure not to touch nail as this may add oil to the nail plate. Make sure nail plate is completely DRY before moving to gel polish application. APPLY: Before applying, wipe excess product from one side of brush against bottle neck. Apply a THIN coat of Gel-n-Base in One and cure 30 seconds under LED lamp or 2 minutes under UV lamp. Repeat the process for a second coat for complete coverage. REMEMBER to CAP the free edge on each of these coats before curing. Apply a THIN coat of Gelaze Gel Top Coat and cap the free edge. Cure for 30 seconds under LED lamp or 2 minutes under UV lamp. CLEANSE: After Top Coat application, wipe cured nails with Gelaze Pre-Soaked Gel Cleanser Pad, or Gelaze Gel Cleanser to remove sticky gel residue. Wash hands with soap and water. INGREDIENTS Di-HEMA Trimethylhexyl Dicarbamate, Sucrose Benzoate, Tetrahydrofurfuryl Methacrylate, HEMA, Hydroxycyclohexyl Phenyl Ketone, Ethyl Trimethylbenzoyl Phenylphosphinate, Benzoyl Isopropanol, Polyester-3, Silica, Barium Sulfate, Mica, Blue 1 (CI42090), Iron Oxides (CI77499), Titanium Dioxide (CI77891), Violet 2 (CI60725)']

title: U-Shinein Solid Nail Extension Gel, 22 PCS Nail Art Glitter DIY Kit, Solid Nail Sculpture Hard Gel, Nail Builder Gel With UV Lamp, Top Coat Base Coat, Nail Forms And Nail Files In Nail Supplies Set
features:
['【All-in-One Solid Builder Gel Kit】Solid builder nail gel kit includes 2x15ml clear solid nail builder gel, 60PCS nail forms, nail file, nail mold, nail cuticle pusher, nail lamp, base coat, top coat gel, 12 Color nail glitter powder, 6 nail pigment powder and 4 colors nail holographic nail powder. The solid nail gel is hand non-sticky, so you don’t need other tools to operate, you can apply the builder gel with your hand. No tools required to operate, which is more suitable for beginners.'
 '【Upgrade Solid Builder Gel】Solid builder nail gel is solid texture but not dry. Solid builder gel not only can do nail extension like poly nail gel, but also can make some diy 3D nail charms with all kinds of mode forms. The solid nail gel can also be a carving gel. You could carve a flower, a shell or other form you want with sculpting tools.'
 '【Manicure Styles】Solid gel and glitter kit can provide you enough materials to make styles of nail art. Combine solid builder gel with nail glitter to make a sparkling nail extension, or combine with nail pigment powder to make colorful nail extension without nail polish. You can also diy different color nail charms or carve different color nail art you like.'
 '【Natural Resin And Long-Lasting】Solid nail builder gel as UV hard gel has great tenacity, high strength and low odor. Environmental friendly and anti-break materials of the builder nail gel ensure your extension nail hard to cracked or peeled. Extend your nail with this solid builder nail gel and keep them complete for about 3 weeks.'
 '【Perfect Gift】Solid nail gel and glitter kit is best and unique gift for manicure lover. Any DIY salon at home don’t worry. Solid and non-sticky texture will be easy to keep clean and easy to modify. Completed set can help you finish all kinds of manicure style. You can DIY your manicure anywhere. Nail extension and nail art carving can be applied to any occasion. Don’t worry and give your mother, sister, wife or girlfriend this perfect gift!']
